headline: DOJ Probes Alleged Insider Trading Scheme That Stung Susquehanna
summary: (Bloomberg) -- The Justice Department is looking into Susquehanna International Group’s allegations that unknown insider traders made $100 million on options bets placed ahead of a recent Chinese regulatory crackdown on cross-border brokerages, according to people familiar with the matter.Most Read from BloombergExxon to Change Name for First Time in Decades After RedomicileMeta Is Planning a Cloud Business to Sell AI Computing PowerKrafton Agrees to Pay ‘Subnautica 2’ Bonuses as Developer’s CEO

headline: Interactive Brokers' June 2026 Client DARTs Rise on Trading Momentum
summary: IBKR's June client DARTs jump 53% year over year as customer accounts climb and trading activity stays strong across key metrics.

headline: Strong demand for U.S. equity trading from EM users says Binance
summary: Shunyet Jen, Head of Exchange & Trading at Binance, says demand for its new U.S. equities offering has been overwhelming, reflecting strong appetite among crypto-native users for assets with a different correlation to crypto.
